title: Cisco Voice Portal Call Detail Record
description: Schema for a CVP Call Detail Record (CDR). CDRs capture comprehensive information about each call processed by the Cisco Unified Customer Voice Portal, including call timing, routing decisions, application interactions, ECC variables, and final disposition. CDR data is stored in the CVP Reporting Database.

callGuid.description: Globally unique identifier for the call, generated by the CVP Call Server when the call is received

callStartTime.description: Timestamp when the call was received by CVP

callingNumber.description: Caller ANI (Automatic Number Identification) - the originating phone number

calledNumber.description: Called DNIS (Dialed Number Identification Service) - the number dialed by the caller

selfServiceDuration.description: Duration spent in self-service IVR in seconds

queueDuration.description: Duration spent in queue waiting for an agent in seconds

applicationName.description: Name of the VXML application that handled the call

callServerHostname.description: Hostname of the Call Server that processed the call

vxmlServerHostname.description: Hostname of the VXML Server that executed the application

sipCallId.description: SIP Call-ID header value from the initial INVITE

icmCallKey.description: ICM/UCCE call key for correlating with contact center records

eccVariables.description: Expanded Call Context (ECC) variables set during the call

transferDestination.description: Transfer destination number if the call was transferred

errorCode.description: Error code if the call ended in error

callLegs.description: Individual call legs that make up this call

legId.description: Unique identifier for this call leg

sipResponseCode.description: Final SIP response code for this leg
